changeLog.what: Added description, anatomy descriptions, usage guidelines, properties

properties.name: Resizing direction
properties.description: Whether the box resizes horizontally, vertically or both

properties.name: Placeholder
properties.description: The placeholder text that is being shown if there has not been any text that has been entered yet.

properties.name: Text
properties.description: The text that is in the input field.

properties.name: Size
properties.description: The vertical density of the input element

properties.name: Input validation text
properties.description: If the input is being validated the outcome / reason of the input validation

properties.name: Input validation type
properties.description: If the input is being validated what type of input validation it is.

properties.name: State
properties.description: The state the input is currently in.

properties.name: Resizable
properties.description: Whether the box is resizable by the user or not

table.name: Validation text
table.description: Text that informs the user of the results of validating the inputted text

table.name: Validation icon
table.description: Informative icon on the nature of the validation result

table.name: Resize area
table.description: Target area for the user to resize the box

table.name: Text
table.description: The text the user inputs. Before the user starts typing there could optionally be placeholder text to indicate the expected content or format.

table.name: Label
table.description: Optional label that can be used to explain what content is expected from the user in the textarea
